work.title: Agents, tools, infrastructure.
work.body: I build the operating layer around agents: harnesses, review loops, local tools, and prototypes that turn fuzzy ideas into running systems.
panelItems: Prototype paths that can survive cleanup

notes.title: Build the system before the story gets too clean.
notes.body: The useful work usually starts rough: a stubborn workflow, a fragile agent loop, a prototype with one honest question inside it.
panelItems: Prefer small interfaces with deep internals
Keep proofs inspectable and claims modest
Let working software clarify the taste

contact.title: Bring the sharp edge.
contact.body: Send the workflow, the failure mode, and the part that is hard to explain. I will tell you what I would build first.
contact.panelTitle: Good briefs have a live constraint.
